name: Spicy Pineapple Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
-------------------
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the cream cheese, almond extract, margarine, and lemon flavoring until smooth.
3. Add powdered sugar and beat until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the zucchini and pineapple with the remaining dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg).
5. Gently stir the dry mixture into the zucchini mixture until just blended.
6. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Dust the finished cake with powdered sugar or top with cream cheese frosting.
